sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66005" key="meli/qreptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελῐ´-θρεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">honey-fed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.122</biblScope> </bibl> (Evenus?).</sense> </entryFree>
